creator: thomas@bsdunix.ch
text:
Created attachment 208170
Diff from cyberchefk 9.7.6 to 9.7.7

Update CyberChef from 9.7.6  to 9.7.7

Whats new:
Added several more file signatures:
AutoCAD Drawing
OGG Video
lzop compressed
TCP Packet
UDP Packet
Compiled HTML
Windows Password
Bitlocker recovery key
Certificate
PGP pubring
PGP secring
PGP Safe
Task Scheduler
Windows Shortcut (lnk)
